title: Learning Event
description: Schema for structured learning and failure events emitted by the OS learning pipeline. Each event is one line in an NDJSON file.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this event instance (e.g., EVT_LEARNING_ROOT_CAUSE_IDENTIFIED_20260207T135632Z)

event_type.description: The event type from the defined taxonomy

component.description: The tool or module that emitted this event (e.g., rca_auto_trigger.py, emit_learning_from_rca.py)

bundle.description: The OS bundle this event originated from, if applicable

rca_report.description: Path to the RCA report that triggered this learning event

root_cause.description: For EVT_LEARNING_ROOT_CAUSE_IDENTIFIED: what was the root cause

corrective_action.description: For EVT_LEARNING_CORRECTIVE_ACTION_RATIFIED: what structural fix was applied

guard_path.description: For EVT_LEARNING_GUARD_INSTALLED: path to the guard script

failure_context.description: For EVT_FAIL_*: what was happening when the failure occurred

prevented_by.description: If this failure was caught by a guard, which guard

supersedes_bundle.description: The bundle where the original failure occurred (for lineage evidence)

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the artifact this event references (guard, fix, report)
